question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्य के लिए, प्रत्येक जिले का नाम और प्रसूति एवं बाल कल्याण केंद्रों की कुल संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, कुल संख्या के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम (descending order) में व्यवस्थित करें, और केवल शीर्ष 5 जिले दिखाएं।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T1.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT T1.district_name, SUM(T3.number_of_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres) AS total_maternity_and_child_care_centres 
FROM dim_district T1 
JOIN dim_sub_district T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id 
JOIN fact_maternity_child_care T3 ON T2.sub_district_id = T3.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_state T4 ON T1.state_id = T4.state_id 
WHERE T4.state_name ILIKE 'andhra pradesh' 
GROUP BY T1.district_name 
ORDER BY total_maternity_and_child_care_centres DESC 
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT T1.district_name, SUM(T3.number_of_maternity_and_child_welfare_centres) AS total_maternity_and_child_care_centres 
FROM dim_district T1 
JOIN dim_sub_district T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id 
JOIN fact_maternity_child_care T3 ON T2.sub_district_id = T3.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_state T4 ON T1.state_id = T4.state_id 
WHERE T4.state_name ILIKE 'andhra pradesh' 
GROUP BY T1.district_name 
ORDER BY total_maternity_and_child_care_centres DESC 
LIMIT 5;
